channel.title: Ithuvia Blog
channel.description: Monthly, practical insights on AI in Higher Education — less hype, more how-to.

item.title: Welcome to Ithuvia: The Human Side of AI in Higher Education
item.description: Ithuvia exists to close the widening gap between fast-moving AI tools and slow-moving institutional policy. This post clarifies what Ithuvia is (and is not), and sets a simple editorial promise: less hype, more how-to. Expect concise, action-oriented monthly briefs for students, faculty, and academic leaders.
